description_long: This rifle features a long, metallic barrel with a prominent muzzle device at the front, and a robust, dark wooden stock at the rear. The receiver and magazine are constructed from metal, with the magazine appearing as a detachable box type. The grip and fore-end are made of wood, providing a classic aesthetic and ergonomic handling. A scope is mounted on top of the receiver, indicating the rifle is designed for precision shooting at distance. The overall finish is a mix of matte metal and polished wood, with visible wear and patina suggesting regular use. The rifle's design is utilitarian, blending traditional materials with modern functionality.
description: A long-barreled rifle with a wooden stock, metal receiver, detachable box magazine, and mounted scope, finished in matte metal and polished wood.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, metal receiver, scope, and detachable magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle device and the narrow profile of the barrel, with the stock and scope barely visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal receiver, scope, and magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the scope and magazine visible from behind.
